data.body: Done (commit pending). rebarProvider.jsx: structured per-kind fields (scripted uses+with.<contract field>, agent prompt/mode/model/with, loop var/max_iterations/while/until, map over/as/index_var/max_concurrency) writing one slice of rebar:Config then re-serializing whole blob → round-trips via serializer. Raw JSON kept as 'Advanced (raw JSON)' collapsible (known kinds) + full fallback (unknown kinds); shared source of truth. Field-level errors (empty-required/non-numeric) keep prior value, no silent loss. Branch UX deferred (out of scope); properties panel owned HERE not 4df6. Bundle rebuilt. 290 unit + 5 browser e2e green (round-trip + error + raw-fallback).
